summary: iter219 Blob Storage Pipeline + Frontend Auth Bypass. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Auth bypass works (app usable without sign-in), EchoWaste panel renders with all 9 tabs. Minor issue: dev_auth_bypass localStorage key not set due to auth-mock taking precedence.

integration_issues.issue: dev_auth_bypass localStorage key not set when ?devAuth=1 used because auth-mock runs first and sets auth_token, which prevents the devAuth bypass code from executing (condition: && !localStorage.getItem('auth_token'))
integration_issues.note: Functional auth bypass WORKS - app is usable without sign-in. Only the localStorage flag is missing.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix devAuth bypass to set dev_auth_bypass=1 even when auth-mock has already set auth_token. Current code at AuthContext.tsx:128 has condition '&& !localStorage.getItem("auth_token")' which prevents the flag from being set.
critical_code_review_comments: blob_storage.py: Well-structured with S3/local fallback, path traversal protection via strict filename validation, proper Cache-Control headers on blob reads.
photo_intake.py: Correctly integrates blob storage, persists photo_blob_url and photo_blob_backend on intake log.
forbes_audit.py: Audit queue correctly stores crop to blob, drops base64 from Mongo doc, re-loads from blob on resolve for fingerprint creation.

AuthContext.tsx: devAuth bypass logic is correct but has race condition with auth-mock - the condition '&& !localStorage.getItem("auth_token")' prevents setting dev_auth_bypass when auth-mock runs first.
test_credentials: No auth required for /api/waste/* or /api/blob/* endpoints. ADMIN_API_TOKEN available if needed.
seed_data_creation: Test photo intakes and audit queue items created during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter219 fully tested. New blob storage endpoints working: /api/blob/health (returns backend=local), /api/blob/{kind}/{filename} (serves images with Cache-Control). Photo-intake now writes to blob storage (photo_blob_url, photo_blob_backend fields). Audit-queue stores crop to blob, drops base64 from Mongo. Path traversal protection working (returns 403). Frontend auth bypass works via auth-mock (not the devAuth bypass code). EchoWaste panel accessible with all 9 tabs.

frontend: Auth bypass with ?devAuth=1 - PASS (app usable, sidebar visible, no sign-in blocking)
localStorage.dev_auth_bypass === '1' - FAIL (auth-mock sets token first, preventing devAuth bypass code from running)
9 tabs found (capture, entries, parsheet, digest, logs, fingerprints, atelier, audit, settings) - PASS
Auth sticky after reload - PASS (token persists)

known_blockers: None. All iter219 features working correctly. The dev_auth_bypass localStorage flag issue is cosmetic - functional auth bypass works.
